---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem or gap?

<!-- What can't you currently do, or what's awkward right now? -->

## What would you like to happen?

<!-- Describe the feature or change. -->

## Which part of the app does this touch?

<!-- e.g. a specific instrument category, the calculation engine, a
     specific page, the certificate generation, deployment/infra. -->

## Anything else to consider?

<!-- Data mapping questions, schema changes, or supervisor confirmation
     needed before this can be built? -->
